subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-08-17
subcodes.first_line: Although the body was weak and not fitted to undergo the vicissitudes of crossing the Atlantic
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @existence; immortality of the human soul, @the mind's power of discovery, @relationship of the soul to the body, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @power of the mind over nature
